overview: The Village of Weston Tourism Commission held its first meeting after reorganization, electing new officers and approving a $5,000 grant for the Taste and Glow Balloonfest. The commission learned that a competing hot air balloon event in Marshfield was canceled, potentially increasing attendance at the Weston event.
presiding: Trustee Erling, Chair (elected at this meeting)

agenda.item: Call to order and Pledge of Allegiance
Approval of minutes from April 21st meeting
New business - Grant request for Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Remarks from staff and commission members

discussions.body: The commission elected new officers for the reorganized commission. Trustee Erling was nominated and elected as Chair unanimously. Cushing was nominated by a commissioner and seconded by Jackson, then elected as Vice Chair unanimously. Renee was nominated and elected as Secretary unanimously.
Minutes from the April 21st meeting were approved. Motion was made and seconded by Renee. Passed unanimously with no discussion.

discussions.item: Grant Request - Taste and Glow Balloonfest
discussions.body: Brandon Jill of 3308 Green Pastures Lane presented the grant request. He reported estimated attendance of 11,000-12,000 last year and announced that the competing Marshfield hot air balloon event was canceled due to permit issues, making theirs the sole event in the area. A commissioner questioned room night tracking, noting the application showed 20 fewer rooms than last year when they received $5,000. The commission discussed needing better hotel room data for future decisions. Motion was made to approve $5,000 grant matching last year's amount, with a request for post-event reporting on attendance changes. Passed unanimously.

Renee reported on attending the Alice in Dairyland dinner at Red Rock Orchard in Edgar. She described meeting the candidates who toured Marathon County attractions including Mullen's Cheese. She noted this was the first time Marathon County hosted the event since the 1970s. The winner, Anastasia, sat at their table and held three bachelor's degrees.

actionItems: Approved $5,000 grant to Taste and Glow Balloonfest for their annual event
Taste and Glow organizers to provide hotel room usage data in their post-event report
Next meeting scheduled for July 20th at 4:00 PM (tentative)
title: Tourism Commission
